title: nepeta multicaulis
intro: Nepeta multicaulis, also known as spreading catmint, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Nepeta multicaulis include relief from digestive issues, such as indigestion and nausea, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and promote a restful sleep. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal and health benefits.
